items.line_en: Let's talk about family.

coach.say: Let's talk about family.
coach.hint: Chunk it: Let's talk about family.

items.line_en: They come in all shapes and sizes.

coach.say: They come in all shapes and sizes.
coach.hint: Chunk it: They come in all shapes and / sizes.

items.line_en: Like, you don't have to be related to someone to be your family.

coach.say: Like, you don't have to be related to someone to be your family.
coach.hint: Chunk it: Like, / you don't have to be related to someone to be your family.

items.line_en: Like, if you love them or like them, they can still be your family.

coach.say: Like, if you love them or like them, they can still be your family.
coach.hint: Chunk it: Like, / if you love them or like them, / they can still be your family.

items.line_en: And our class is a family.

coach.say: And our class is a family.
coach.hint: Chunk it: And our class is a family.

items.line_en: You'll take a look at the family.

coach.say: You'll take a look at the family.
coach.hint: Chunk it: You'll take a look at the family.

items.line_en: You find a school.

coach.say: You find a school.
coach.hint: Chunk it: You find a school.

items.line_en: What? There's family at school?

coach.say: What? There's family at school?
coach.hint: Chunk it: What? / There's family at school?

items.line_en: That's right, there is.

coach.say: That's right, there is.
coach.hint: Chunk it: That's right, / there is.

items.line_en: Come on, let's watch it together.

coach.say: Come on, let's watch it together.
coach.hint: Chunk it: Come on, / let's watch it together.

items.line_en: Our class is a family.

coach.say: Our class is a family.
coach.hint: Chunk it: Our class is a family.

items.line_en: When you think of a family, you might picture one in a house.

coach.say: When you think of a family, you might picture one in a house.
coach.hint: Chunk it: When you think of a family, / you might picture one in a house.

items.line_en: A mom, a dad, a couple of kids, plus their dogs, and a pet mouse.

coach.say: A mom, a dad, a couple of kids, plus their dogs, and a pet mouse.
coach.hint: Chunk it: A mom, a dad, / a couple of kids, plus their dogs, and a pet mouse.

items.line_en: Perhaps you think of grandma, or a stepmom and stepdad.

coach.say: Perhaps you think of grandma, or a stepmom and stepdad.
coach.hint: Chunk it: Perhaps you think of grandma, / or a stepmom and stepdad.

items.line_en: It could be those 14 cousins, or that twin who makes you mad.

coach.say: It could be those 14 cousins, or that twin who makes you mad.
coach.hint: Chunk it: It could be those 14 cousins, / or that twin who makes you mad.

items.line_en: But family doesn't have to be who you are related to.

coach.say: But family doesn't have to be who you are related to.
coach.hint: Chunk it: But family doesn't have to be who you are related to.

items.line_en: It can be another special group who love and care for you.

coach.say: It can be another special group who love and care for you.
coach.hint: Chunk it: It can be another special group who love and / care for you.

items.line_en: Have you ever thought about where most of your time is spent?

coach.say: Have you ever thought about where most of your time is spent?
coach.hint: Chunk it: Have you ever thought about where most of your time is spent?

items.line_en: It's at school with all of us.

coach.say: It's at school with all of us.
coach.hint: Chunk it: It's at school with all of us.

items.line_en: That's where all those hours went.

coach.say: That's where all those hours went.
coach.hint: Chunk it: That's where all those hours went.

items.line_en: So if our classroom is the place where we spend our days, why wouldn't we want to make

coach.say: So if our classroom is the place where we spend our days, why wouldn't we want to make
coach.hint: Chunk it: So if our classroom is the place where we spend our days, / why wouldn't we want to make

items.line_en: it like a home in many ways?

coach.say: it like a home in many ways?
coach.hint: Chunk it: it like a home in many ways?

items.line_en: It's a place where we can show respect and kindness to each other.

coach.say: It's a place where we can show respect and kindness to each other.
coach.hint: Chunk it: It's a place where we can show respect and / kindness to each other.

items.line_en: A spot where we can be ourselves and make memories with one another.

coach.say: A spot where we can be ourselves and make memories with one another.
coach.hint: Chunk it: A spot where we can be ourselves and / make memories with one another.

items.line_en: We'll have things in common.

coach.say: We'll have things in common.
coach.hint: Chunk it: We'll have things in common.

items.line_en: These are connections that we'll seek.

coach.say: These are connections that we'll seek.
coach.hint: Chunk it: These are connections that we'll seek.

items.line_en: But we'll still celebrate our differences, and what makes us each unique.

coach.say: But we'll still celebrate our differences, and what makes us each unique.
coach.hint: Chunk it: But we'll still celebrate our differences, / and what makes us each unique.

items.line_en: Our classroom is a special haven, where it's okay to make mistakes.

coach.say: Our classroom is a special haven, where it's okay to make mistakes.
coach.hint: Chunk it: Our classroom is a special haven, / where it's okay to make mistakes.

items.line_en: We learn from them, and try again, no matter what it takes.

coach.say: We learn from them, and try again, no matter what it takes.
coach.hint: Chunk it: We learn from them, / and try again, / no matter what it takes.

items.line_en: We'll all have tough days sometimes, but your teacher is here for you.

coach.say: We'll all have tough days sometimes, but your teacher is here for you.
coach.hint: Chunk it: We'll all have tough days sometimes, / but your teacher is here for you.

items.line_en: And as long as you're a friend to others, your peers will be there too.

coach.say: And as long as you're a friend to others, your peers will be there too.
coach.hint: Chunk it: And as long as you're a friend to others, / your peers will be there too.

items.line_en: In this classroom of four walls, we will stick together.

coach.say: In this classroom of four walls, we will stick together.
coach.hint: Chunk it: In this classroom of four walls, / we will stick together.

items.line_en: We'll help each other learn and grow in any kind of weather.

coach.say: We'll help each other learn and grow in any kind of weather.
coach.hint: Chunk it: We'll help each other learn and / grow in any kind of weather.

items.line_en: So let's always remember what a great team we can be.

coach.say: So let's always remember what a great team we can be.
coach.hint: Chunk it: So let's always remember what a great team we can be.

items.line_en: You have our back, and we have yours.

coach.say: You have our back, and we have yours.
coach.hint: Chunk it: You have our back, / and we have yours.

items.line_en: We are a classroom family.
